## Certara Valuation Questioned Following NVIDIA AI Collaboration

NVDA's expanding AI collaboration footprint across verticals (here, life-sciences software) is a recurring platform-thesis data point, but this headline provides no confirmable fundamental update — monitor for follow-on coverage with concrete deal substance.

- Coverage asks whether CERT is a bargain in the wake of a reported NVIDIA AI collaboration, framing this primarily as a CERT valuation piece.
- NVDA's role appears incidental — the headline surfaces the collaboration as context for a CERT entry-point question, not as a new NVDA fundamental event.
- No deal terms, scope, or financial specifics are present in the headline.
